footer.tagline: Time tracking for start, break and resume.

hero.title: Track start, break, resume.
hero.subtitle: A clear SaaS to track hours without spreadsheets. One click to start, one click to pause, and reports that make time visible by day, week and team.

features.title: Human-first time tracking.
features.subtitle: Combine timer, breaks and projects to see your real hours and energy.

cards.title: Punch modes
cards.copy: Start, break, resume, end. Nothing more, nothing less.

cards.title: Flexible planning
cards.copy: Set a weekly target, let the tool adjust.

cards.title: Smart alerts
cards.copy: Gentle notification if a break runs too long.

cards.title: Team insights
cards.copy: Compare load, breaks and focus by team.

cards.title: Time zones
cards.copy: Automatic smoothing for remote and shift work.

cards.title: Clean exports
cards.copy: CSV, PDF or connect to your payroll tool.

steps.title: A typical day in 3 moves.
steps.subtitle: No more missed punches and manual edits. The data builds itself.
items: Start your timer when the day begins.
Pause with one click, resume just the same.
End the day and get instant stats.

pricing.title: A clear plan for every team.
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then switch to team mode when tracking gets critical.

faq.subtitle: No complexity, just clean tracking and useful visibility for teams.

closing.title: Turn time into useful decisions.
closing.subtitle: Activate TempoWork, track hours without friction and share simple stats with your team.

included.title: Everything to track start, break and resume without effort.
included.subtitle: Core features stay available on every plan. The difference is depth of insights and team management.

example.subtitle: An 8-person team saves about 3 hours per month by removing missed punches.

closing.title: Launch your tracking today.
closing.subtitle: Create your space, add a team and track breaks from day one.

hero.title: We help teams make time visible.
hero.subtitle: TempoWork was born from a simple need: stop spreadsheets and give teams a clear view of their real hours. We build a tool that respects each rhythm, with clear stats and clean reports.

mission.title: Give modern teams a healthier rhythm.
mission.subtitle: We believe work time should stay readable and human. Our mission is to help managers, freelancers and distributed teams understand real workload and act fast.

values.title: Clarity
values.copy: Crisp tracking, no friction or jargon.

values.title: Trust
values.copy: Transparent data, shared with the team.

steps.title: Listen
steps.copy: We start from real team feedback.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.copy: One week to test an idea, no more.

story.title: From spreadsheet to a clear suite.
story.subtitle: We launched TempoWork in 2023 to replace a manual tracker used by a hybrid team. Since then, the product evolved with different rhythms, time zones and payroll constraints.

closing.title: Ready to make your hours visible?
closing.subtitle: Start a free trial and see your stats from week one.

template.title: Template
template.guideIntro: Already have an invoice as a .docx file? Open it in Word or Pages and replace the variable information (name, address, amounts...) with the fields below. When generating, they will be automatically replaced with real data.
template.guideHow: For example, where you wrote your company name, replace it with '{{companyName}}'. Where the total is, put '{{total}}', etc.
template.guideItemsHelp: To automatically list each service, wrap a sample line with '{{#items}}' and '{{/items}}'. Everything between the two will be repeated for each line of the invoice. You can also use '{{hours}}' as an alias for '{{quantity}}'.
template.guideDownloadTip: Tip: download the pre-filled template to see a concrete example.
